name: Chocolate Velvet Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, pecans, granulated sugar, and melted margarine. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Add the brown sugar and mix until well blended. Stir in the melted semi-sweet chips, sour cream, granulated sugar, almond-flavored liqueur, and vanilla extract. Mix until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture over the crust.
4. Bake at 325°F for 35 minutes.
5. Increase the oven temperature to 425°F. Whisk together the remaining sour cream and granulated sugar. Carefully spread this mixture over the cheesecake.
6. Return to the oven and bake at 425°F for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and allow the cake to cool before carefully removing the rim of the springform pan. Chill.
